# Admin UI Vendor Libraries

## cytoscape.esm.js

- **Package**: cytoscape
- **Version**: 3.30.2
- **Format**: ESM bundle (single file, inlined dependencies)
- **Source**: https://esm.sh/cytoscape@3.30.2/es2020/cytoscape.bundle.mjs
- **Obtained**: 2026-04-30

## cytoscape-fcose.esm.js

- **Package**: cytoscape-fcose
- **Version**: 2.2.0
- **Format**: ESM bundle (single file, inlined cose-base / layout-base)
- **Source**: https://esm.sh/cytoscape-fcose@2.2.0/X-ZGN5dG9zY2FwZUAzLjMwLjI/es2020/cytoscape-fcose.bundle.mjs
- **Obtained**: 2026-04-30

## Notes

Both files were fetched from esm.sh with the `?bundle` flag so that all transitive
dependencies are inlined. No runtime CDN requests are made by the admin UI.
